steps.t: Fredegunda believes cave-claw burglars have stolen each of the missing items and maintains that the items could all be found inside the tunnel to the …
Inside the tunnel, you have found each of the items Fredegunda Cutt believed you would. You should return each of the items to their owners in the vil…
You have returned the stolen items to their respective owners. You should return to Fredegunda Cutt in Staddle and tell her what happened.
